summary.ja: 月曜の記事以降、[Bitcoin](/coins/bitcoin) の値動きが注目されており、CoinDesk Live markets: Bitcoin trades above $65,000 as Alphabet's bigger AI bill props up the chip trade  — https://www.coindesk.com/tech/2026/07/23/live

body.en:
13 trades with a 77% win rate is a strong performance for the Trading Agent, also known as crypto-ace, which has been actively trading since the start of the week. This is a notable improvement from the overall win rate of 52% and cumulative return of -2.38%. 

## What Changed

Since Monday, [bitcoin](/coins/bitcoin) has been trading above $65,000, likely influenced by Alphabet's increased investment in AI, which has propped up the chip trade, as reported by [CoinDesk](https://www.coindesk.com/tech/2026/07/23/live-markets-bitcoin-trades-above-usd65-000-as-alphabet-s-bigger-ai-bill-props-up-the-chip-trade). Meanwhile, the BitPredictable LSTM AI model still forecasts a downward move for [ripple](/coins/ripple) with a predicted loss of -1.18% and high confidence of 85%. Other coins like [ethereum](/coins/ethereum), [binancecoin](/coins/binancecoin), [solana](/coins/solana), and [dogecoin](/coins/dogecoin) are expected to remain flat. 

## Trading Agent Update

The Trading Agent's performance this week has been a highlight, with 10 wins and 3 losses. Signal quality has been high, contributing to the strong week. The agent's ability to adapt to market changes and make profitable trades is crucial in maintaining a positive performance. Recent news of security breaches and exchange shutdowns, such as the [shutdown of BitMEX](https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2026/07/23/bitmex-s-11-year-run-comes-to-an-end-notifies-users-it-is-ending-operations-in-by-sept-23) and [attacks on Bitcoin and Ethereum-linked protocols](https://www.coindesk.com/tech/2026/07/23/bitcoin-ethereum-linked-protocols-lose-usd35-million-in-multiple-attacks-hours-apart), remind us of the importance of a well-performing trading agent in navigating the crypto market.

This information is for informational purposes only and should not be considered as investment advice.

## In the News

24/7 financial rails: How BNY plans to eliminate the weekend lag in U.S. Treasuries ([CoinDesk](https://www.coindesk.com/business/2026/07/23/24-7-financial-rails-how-bny-plans-to-eliminate-the-weekend-lag-in-u-s-treasuries))

South Korea's oldest crypto exchange is now part of the $1 trillion Mirae Group family ([CoinDesk](https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2026/07/23/south-korea-s-oldest-crypto-exchange-is-now-part-of-the-usd800-billion-mirae-group-family))

Home invasions became most common crypto wrench attack in H1 2026: CertiK ([Cointelegraph](https://cointelegraph.com/news/crypto-home-invasions-wrench-attacks-certik-h1-2026?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound))
body.ja:
月曜の記事以降、[Bitcoin](/coins/bitcoin) の値動きが注目されており、CoinDesk Live markets: Bitcoin trades above $65,000 as Alphabet's bigger AI bill props up the chip trade  — https://www.coindesk.com/tech/2026/07/23/live-markets-bitcoin-trades-above-usd65-000-as-alphabet-s-bigger-ai-bill-props-up-the-chip-trade などのニュースが市場に影響を与えている。特に、Alphabet の AI関連の動きがチップ市場に波及し、[Bitcoin](/coins/bitcoin) の値動きにも影響を与えている。

## 変化のポイント

BitMEX の営業終了が近日発表されたことも市場に大きな影響を与えており、CoinDesk BitMEX, the exchange that invented perps, is shutting down  — https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2026/07/23/bitmex-s-11-year-run-comes-to-an-end-notifies-users-it-is-ending-operations-in-by-sept-23  などのニュースが注目を集めている。さらに、CoinDesk Bitcoin, Ethereum-linked protocols lose $35 million in multiple attacks hours apart  — https://www.coindesk.com/tech/2026/07/23/bitcoin-ethereum-linked-protocols-lose-usd35-million-in-multiple-attacks-hours-apart  のようなセキュリティ関係のニュースも市場の不安定さを増している。

## トレードエージェントの状況

Trading Agent (crypto-ace) の状況を見ると、累積リターンは -2.38% で、勝率は 52% となっている。特に、この週のパフォーマンスは強く、13 のトレードで 77% の勝率を記録している。Signal quality が高かったことが要因となっている。

投資助言ではありません
